creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text: This should be fixed in r356925. configure checks glut existence and libwebpdemux option, and then sets build_vwebp based on the detection result. If glut is installed, build_vwebp will be set to yes regardless of X11 option. This patch explicitly sets build_vwebp=no to avoid stage orphan (PREFIX/bin/vwebp) if X11 option is off.
